---
title: "LaTeX Math Exam"
---

# Mathematical Statistics Exam

Show all derivations. Partial credit given for correct work.

## Question 1 [15 pts]

Given $X_1, X_2, \ldots, X_n \sim N(\mu, \sigma^2)$, what is the distribution of $\bar{X}$?

a) $N(\mu, \sigma^2)$
b) $N(\mu, \sigma^2/n)$ [x]
c) $N(0, 1)$
d) $t_{n-1}$

## Question 2 [20 pts]

Derive the maximum likelihood estimator for $\mu$ given the likelihood function:

$$L(\mu) = \prod_{i=1}^{n} \frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi\sigma^2}} \exp\left(-\frac{(x_i - \mu)^2}{2\sigma^2}\right)$$

## Question 3 [15 pts]

The moment generating function of $X \sim N(\mu, \sigma^2)$ is:

$$M_X(t) = \exp\left(\mu t + \frac{\sigma^2 t^2}{2}\right)$$

Use this to find $E[X]$ and $\text{Var}(X)$.

## Question 4 [10 pts]

If $Z \sim N(0,1)$, calculate $P(|Z| > 1.96)$.

**Answer:** 0.05
